case_title: PERRY GREGG VS. BOSSA NOVA ROBOTICS

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GREGG, PERRY AS TO DEFENDANT BOSSA NOVA ROBOTICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
